message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title **Initialization**

box "service process" #LightBlue
participant ConcreteImpl #PeachPuff
participant DBusAdapter #LightGreen
end box

participant DBus #LightGray

box "client process" #LightBlue/LightSteelBlue
participant DBusProxy #LightGreen
end box

DBusAdapter <- DBusAdapter : Init(ConcreteImpl)
DBusAdapter -> DBus : Export

... ...

DBusProxy <- DBusProxy : Init

note right of DBusProxy
Tries to fetch all properties
including "ready" property
end note

DBus <- DBusProxy : ConnectToRemoteObject
DBus <- DBusProxy : GetAllProperties
ConcreteImpl <- DBusAdapter : GetAllProperties
ConcreteImpl ..> DBusAdapter : return properties
DBus ..> DBusProxy : return properties

@enduml
```
